name: Sigma Computing Analytics API
what_it_does: Sigma Computing REST API for cloud-based BI tool that combines spreadsheet familiarity with direct cloud data warehouse querying. Enables AI agents to manage workbooks, query data, manage users and permissions, and trigger data refreshes. Sigma connects directly to Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, and Redshift.
use_cases: Querying Sigma workbook data and running custom analyses from analytics agents
Managing Sigma workbooks and dataset access from data governance agents
Triggering Sigma workbook refreshes and exports from data pipeline agents
Retrieving user and team analytics activity from workspace management agents
not_for: Organizations without cloud data warehouses (Sigma requires Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, or Redshift)
Simple reporting needs (Sigma is complex enterprise BI)
best_when: An organization using Sigma Computing on top of Snowflake or Databricks wants AI agents to query workbooks, manage content, and integrate Sigma analytics into automated workflows.
avoid_when: You don't have an existing cloud data warehouse and Sigma subscription. Sigma requires significant infrastructure investment.

auth.notes: Sigma API uses bearer token authentication. Client credentials generated in Sigma Admin Portal. Token-based access for service accounts.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Enterprise pricing only; contact Sigma sales
pricing.paid_tiers: Sigma pricing based on data warehouse connections and users
pricing.notes: Enterprise BI pricing. Sigma sits on top of existing data warehouse subscription.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API integration required
API documentation is less comprehensive than major BI platforms
Sigma queries run against underlying data warehouse — cost implications for agent queries
Enterprise pricing and data warehouse requirement limits adoption
Query performance depends on underlying warehouse performance and caching
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise analytics with sensitive business data. SOC2 and GDPR. Bearer token auth. Data flows through Sigma to underlying cloud warehouse.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise BI analytics. SOC2 and GDPR. Data passes through Sigma to cloud warehouses. Bearer token security.
